texto: A night of exhilaration, of boredom and terror, in which the merest of sounds took on other forms - grew large in the expanse of darkness. After several hours the sheep gradually stopped calling to each other from accross the river banks, and a brittle quiet descended. I desperately wanted to walk down to the water's edge. To see the black river in the moonlight. But a mixture of reason and fear kept me locked along the safe paths high above.
explicacao: Citação de Richard Skelton sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “A night of exhilaration, of boredom and terror, in which the merest of sounds took on other forms…” articula coragem, affraid, aloneness em registro de coragem, com relevância para contextos como reflexao-noturna e boa-noite.
